hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive design solutions for every need
hero.description: From concept to completion, we offer a full range of architecture and interior design services.

mainServices.title: Residential Architecture
mainServices.description: Custom home design that reflects your lifestyle and personality. From villas to apartments, we create spaces that feel like home.

mainServices.title: Interior Design
mainServices.description: Thoughtful interiors that inspire and delight. We blend aesthetics with functionality to create beautiful, livable spaces.

mainServices.title: Commercial Spaces
mainServices.description: Innovative designs for offices, retail, and hospitality. We create environments that enhance productivity and customer experience.

itTakesAnArmy.title: It Takes an Army
itTakesAnArmy.subtitle: Behind every successful project is a team of dedicated professionals
itTakesAnArmy.description: We believe in collaboration. Our network of skilled craftsmen, contractors, and specialists ensures that every aspect of your project is handled with expertise and care.

benefits.title: Expert Craftsmen
benefits.description: We work with the finest carpenters, masons, and artisans who bring our designs to life with precision.

benefits.title: Trusted Contractors
benefits.description: Our network of reliable contractors ensures quality execution and timely completion.

benefits.title: Quality Materials
benefits.description: We source premium materials from trusted suppliers, ensuring durability and aesthetics.

benefits.title: Project Coordination
benefits.description: Our dedicated project managers coordinate all aspects, so you do not have to worry about a thing.

servicesList.title: What We Offer
servicesList.subtitle: Comprehensive services to bring your vision to life
